sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check animation frames to see if the yellow object moved differently
if last_animation:
    for i, entry in enumerate(last_animation):
        print(f"Action {i}: {entry.action}")
        for j, frame in enumerate(entry.frames):
            seg = frame.segmentation
            y_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
            print(f"  Frame {j}:")
            for n in y_nodes:
                print(f"    Yellow: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Also check the current state of gray bars
seg = current_frame.segmentation
gray_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w']
print(f"\nCurrent gray nodes: {len(gray_nodes)}")
for n in gray_nodes:
    print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
